verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My only hope is You, Jesus, My only hope is You. From early in the morning till late at night, My only hope is You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My only peace is You, Jesus, My only peace is You. From early in the morning till late at night, My only peace is You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My only joy is You, Jesus, My only joy is You. From early in the morning till late at night, My only joy is You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All that I need is You, Jesus, All that I need is You. From early in the morning till late at night, All that I need is You.
